description:
This friendly template is perfect for sharing information about your human resource software with HR departments, hiring & talent managers, sourcing professionals, and recruiters. 

All Beefree templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: I’m an artisan user interface designer and front-end developer. I'm passionate about data visualization, user experience design and analytics interfaces. I enjoy solving complex problems that require a deep understanding of interface design, front-end development, and product management.
